caption: A video call display shows a grid of multiple participants in various indoor settings. The interface repeats the same set of individuals in a repeating pattern across the screen. Participants are mostly men and women wearing casual attire, such as t-shirts and button-down shirts. Some individuals are speaking, while others listen or look at their screens. Visible on-screen names include "Jerry McHobby", "Edward Silverman", "Greg Bellido", "Jim Bartle", "Zajja Cillio", "Patrick Narayan", "Era_collaborator", "Irisan Singh", "Irvance-de Kyen", "Kyla Setz", "Branko Pittman", "Justin Severin", "Harl K.", "Clara Ruger", "Byarl Layon", and "Scott Mooring". The background environments vary, featuring bookshelves, indoor plants, and simple walls. The layout of the participants remains constant throughout the clip, with only subtle movements and changes in facial expressions as the call progresses.
